## Status and source

- Project status: Discovery / Implementation
- Information changed: Confirmed / Provisional / Open decision / Out of scope
- Related issue or decision:

## Coordination

- [ ] I read `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, and relevant `docs/` files.
- [ ] I did not silently resolve an item in `docs/OPEN_DECISIONS.md`.
- [ ] Shared context/contracts and adjacent workstreams were considered.
- [ ] Documentation reflects any product or architecture decision change.

## Safety and verification

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal data, or local environment files are included.
- [ ] Mocked/simulated behavior is labeled and not described as live.
- [ ] No dependency, framework, infrastructure, or integration was added without a recorded decision.
- [ ] `main` remains stable.
